zh.lifeSummary: 當Dyddgu verch Iorwerth於1050年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾時，她的父親Iorwerth ap Cadwgon20歲，母親Gwenllian ARON31歲。她於大約1092年與Llywarch ap Trahaearn在威爾士結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dyddgu verch Iorwerth于1050年出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾时，她的父亲Iorwerth ap Cadwgon20岁，母亲Gwenllian ARON31岁。她于大约1092年与Llywarch ap Trahaearn在威尔士结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dyddgu verch Iorwerth was born in 1050, in Radnorshire, Wales, her father, Iorwerth ap Cadwgon, was 20 and her mother, Gwenllian ARON, was 31. She married Llywarch ap Trahaearn about 1092, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dyddgu verch Iorwerth est née en 1050, à Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Iorwerth ap Cadwgon, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ARON, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Llywarch ap Trahaearn environ 1092, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dyddgu verch Iorwerth 1050 in Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Iorwerth ap Cadwgon 20 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian ARON 31. Sie hat um 1092 in Wales Llywarch ap Trahaearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dyddgu verch Iorwerth è nata il nel 1050 nel Radnorshire, Galles, sua padre, Iorwerth ap Cadwgon, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian ARON, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Llywarch ap Trahaearn circa 1092, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Dyddgu verch Iorwerthが1050年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Iorwerth ap Cadwgonは20歳，母Gwenllian ARONは31歳であった。約1092年にウェールズでLlywarch ap Trahaearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Dyddgu verch Iorwerth(이)가 1050년 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Iorwerth ap Cadwgon(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ARON(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1092년 웨일스에서 Llywarch ap Trahaearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dyddgu verch Iorwerth nasceu em 1050, em Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Iorwerth ap Cadwgon, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ARON, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Llywarch ap Trahaearn aproximadamente 1092, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dyddgu verch Iorwerth родилась в 1050 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Iorwerth ap Cadwgon было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ARON, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llywarch ap Trahaearn около 1092 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dyddgu verch Iorwerth nació en 1050, en Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Iorwerth ap Cadwgon, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ARON, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Llywarch ap Trahaearn aproximadamente 1092, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas.
